title: Fixative Preparation for Baermann Funnel Extraction
author: Casey A Schlenker

steps.title: Dissolve in 20 mL of DI water
steps.instruction: Dissolve in 20 mL of DI water

steps.title: Incubate in water bath at 60...
steps.instruction: Incubate in water bath at 60 °C to help dissolve PFA powder for 00:40:00

steps.title: Add 20 µL of 1 M...
steps.instruction: Add 20 µL of 1 M NaOH to further help dissolve PFA powder

steps.title: Place back in 60 °C water bath for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Place back in 60 °C water bath for 00:10:00

steps.title: Pull out of water bath and cool to Room temperature
steps.instruction: Pull out of water bath and cool to Room temperature

steps.title: Add two tablets of PBS to...
steps.instruction: Add two tablets of PBS to a 100 mL volumetric flask

steps.title: Mix 20 mL of each solution to get 4% formaldehyde
steps.instruction: Mix 20 mL of each solution to get 4% formaldehyde

steps.title: Add 400 µL of glycerol to fixative
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL of glycerol to fixative

steps.title: Place fixative in a hot water bath till 60 °C
steps.instruction: Place fixative in a hot water bath till 60 °C

steps.title: If still not dissolved, add 10...
steps.instruction: If still not dissolved, add 10 µL more of 1M NaOH
